description: Native English. Female, late 30s. High-fidelity, crisp and clean. Persona: composed Lakeward realist. Emotion: calm, precise, dry. A low, level alto with warm chest resonance and a faint flat rural-Michigan vowel under the enclave polish; she lowers rather than raises under stress, speaking in clean load-bearing sentences with deliberate pauses, measured but never slow.
text: [serious] I'm not asking you to be afraid. I'm asking you to look at it... plainly. [deliberate] Tell me what we do if the walls don't hold. Not later... now. [warm] We make something of our own.
